name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
description: Adversaries may abuse command interpreters to execute commands.
detection_notes: Monitor suspicious shell and script interpreter usage.

name: Phishing
description: Adversaries may send phishing messages to gain access.
detection_notes: Detect malicious attachments, links, and sender anomalies.

name: Network Service Discovery
description: Adversaries may scan services on a network to identify targets.
detection_notes: Look for unusual port scanning and service enumeration patterns.
